zh.lifeSummary: 當Mary Ann Rennick於從1520年1月11日到1521年1月10日出生在英國萊希斯特斯爾時，她的父親William Rennick21歲，母親Ann Hamilton21歲。她於1528年與Thomas Parsons在英國結婚。他們至少是3個兒子的父母。她去世於從1580年1月11日到1581年1月10日在英國英格蘭。

zh-hans.Diseworth, Leicestershire, England: 英国萊希斯特斯爾迪瑟沃斯
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Mary Ann Rennick于从1520年1月11日到1521年1月10日出生在英国萊希斯特斯爾时，她的父亲William Rennick21岁，母亲Ann Hamilton21岁。她于1528年与Thomas Parsons在英国结婚。他们至少是3个儿子的父母。她去世于从1580年1月11日到1581年1月10日在英国英格兰。

nameMeanings.name: Rennick
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Altered form of German Rennich, a variant of Reinecke .

variants.name: Renwick
meanings: Scottish and northern English: habitational name from Renwick (Cumberland), from an Old English personal name Hræfn (genitive Hræfnes) + Old English wīc ‘dwelling, specialized farm’.

nameMeanings.name: Mary
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From Latin Maria via Old Welsh Meir. See Mary .

nameMeanings.name: Ann
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Variant spelling of Anne . In the U.S. Ann is the more frequent spelling.

historicEvents.title: Book of Common Prayer
historicEvents.description: Book of Common Prayer, a product of the English Reformation, was published in 1549 for assistance in the administration of the sacraments and other rites and ceremonies of the church according to the use of the Church of England. The book outlined morning, evening, and communion prayers and orders for baptism and marriage, thus making England a truly Protestant state.

historicEvents.title: Act of Uniformity
historicEvents.description: The Act of Uniformity was passed by the Parliament of England and required all people to go to church once a week. The consequence of not attending church was a fine of 12 pence, which was a considerable amount for a poor person.

historicEvents.title: State Lottery
historicEvents.description: A State Lottery was recorded in 1569. The tickets were sold at St. Paul's Cathedral in London.

historicEvents.title: The Royal Exchange is Organized
historicEvents.description: The Royal Exchange was organized in January 1571 by Sir Thomas Gresham. Gresham is known as the father of English banking.

en.lifeSummary: When Mary Ann Rennick was born from 11 January 1520 to 10 January 1521, in Leicestershire, England, her father, William Rennick, was 21 and her mother, Ann Hamilton, was 21. She married Thomas Parsons in 1528, in England. They were the parents of at least 3 sons. She died from 11 January 1580 to 10 January 1581, in England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Mary Ann Rennick est née du 11 janvier 1520 au 10 janvier 1521, à Leicestershire, Angleterre, son père, William Rennick, avait 21 ans et sa mère, Ann Hamilton, avait 21 ans. Elle a épousé Thomas Parsons en 1528, à Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils. Elle est décédée du 11 janvier 1580 au 10 janvier 1581, à Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

Sie hat 1528 in England Thomas Parsons geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne. Sie starb von 11. Januar 1580 bis 10. Januar 1581 in England, United Kingdom.

ko.lifeSummary: Mary Ann Rennick(이)가 1520년 1월 11일부터 1521년 1월 10일까지 영국 레이스스터실르에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 William Rennick(은)는 21세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Ann Hamilton(은)는 21세였다. 그녀는 1528년 영국에서 Thomas Parsons(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 1580년 1월 11일부터 1581년 1월 10일까지 영국 잉글랜드에서 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Mary Ann Rennick родилась с 11 января 1520 по 10 января 1521 в местности лисестиршир, Англия, её отцу по имени William Rennick было 21 год, а матери, которую звали Ann Hamilton, 21. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Thomas Parsons в 1528 г. в местности Англия. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына. Она умерла с 11 января 1580 по 10 января 1581 в местности Англия, Великобритания.
